results.title: Double Each Character
results.description: Write a program to double each character of the given word.

results.title: Check Arrays Have Same Elements
results.description: Write a program that checks if two arrays contain the same unique elements (regardless of duplicates or order).
results.code:
# Static input arrays
a1 = [1, 2, 3, 2, 1]
a2 = [1, 2, 3]
a3 = [1, 2, 3, 4]

def same_unique_elements(arr1, arr2):
    return set(arr1) == set(arr2)

# Test cases
print("(a1, a2) -", same_unique_elements(a1, a2))
print("(a1, a3) -", same_unique_elements(a1, a3))
